sql: WITH s AS ( SELECT ct.net_sol, ct.lead_wallet, ct.entry_ts, ct.mint FROM copy_trades ct WHERE ct.strategy_id='copy-hotlead-strict' AND ct.status='closed' AND ct.net_sol IS NOT NULL ), lp AS ( SELECT s.net_sol, gm.pumpswap_initial_lp_sol lps FROM s JOIN graduations g ON g.id=(SELECT MAX(g2.id) FROM graduations g2 WHERE g2.mint=s.mint) LEFT JOIN graduation_momentum gm ON gm.graduation_id=g.id ), base AS ( SELECT lead_wallet, entry_ts, exit_ts, net_sol FROM copy_trades WHERE strategy_id='copy-tp100-sl30' AND status='closed' AND net_sol IS NOT NULL ), cs AS ( SELECT s.net_sol, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT p.net_sol pn FROM base p WHERE p.lead_wallet=s.lead_wallet AND p.exit_ts<=s.entry_ts ORDER BY p.exit_ts DESC LIMIT 3) WHERE pn<=0) nloss, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT p.net_sol pn FROM base p WHERE p.lead_wallet=s.lead_wallet AND p.exit_ts<=s.entry_ts ORDER BY p.exit_ts DESC LIMIT 3)) lastn FROM s ) SELECT 'lp_'||CASE WHEN lps IS NULL THEN 'null' WHEN lps<25 THEN 'a_lt25' WHEN lps<40 THEN 'b_25_40' WHEN lps<60 THEN 'c_40_60' ELSE 'd_ge60' END k, COUNT(*) n, ROUND(SUM(net_sol),2) net, ROUND(AVG(net_sol),4) avg_net, ROUND(AVG(net_sol>0),3) wr FROM lp GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'cs_'||CASE WHEN lastn<3 THEN 'thin' WHEN nloss=3 THEN 'streak3loss' WHEN nloss=2 THEN 'loss2of3' ELSE 'ok01' END, COUNT(*), ROUND(SUM(net_sol),2), ROUND(AVG(net_sol),4), ROUND(AVG(net_sol>0),3) FROM cs GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY k
